title: Translation Ai
description: High-quality multilingual translation powered by AI technology

hero.subtitle: One-stop multilingual translation solution, supporting text, image, PDF, speech and video translation

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Text, image, PDF, speech, and video—one tool for every format

text.title: Text Translation
text.description: Long-form and multi-language support; accurate and natural. Unlimited free use when logged in

image.title: Image Translation
image.description: One-click OCR and translation from screenshots, photos, and posters in many languages

pdf.title: PDF Translation
pdf.description: Extract full text and translate while preserving layout and structure for documents

speech.title: Speech Translation
speech.description: Speak or upload audio; multi-language recognition and translation for meetings and study

video.title: Video Translation
video.description: Extract on-screen text and speech from video and get translations for learning and content creation

highlights.title: Key Benefits
highlights.subtitle: Upload, translate, and switch input types in one browser—no install required

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: UI in Chinese, English, Japanese, or Spanish; translate across many widely used language pairs

theme.title: Theme Switching
theme.description: Switch between dark and light mode for comfortable use day or night

privacy.title: Privacy Protection
privacy.description: We don't retain translations or uploads long-term on our servers; third-party AI may process content to deliver the service

web.title: Web-based
web.description: Use in your browser—no install needed, on phone or desktop

steps.title: How It Works
steps.subtitle: Pick a mode, add your content, review the output—all in your browser

select.title: Choose Function
select.description: Choose text, image, PDF, speech, or video translation for your content

upload.title: Upload Content
upload.description: Upload files, paste text, or submit audio and video as guided

translate.title: Get Results
translate.description: Review and copy the translation; adjust language pair or model when needed

testimonials.title: Loved by people who work across languages
testimonials.subtitle: Short notes from translators, students, and teams—about how they actually use Translation Ai.

1.quote: I live in screenshots and UI strings. Pulling text out of product mockups used to be half my day; now I draft in one place and iterate faster.
1.author: Elena Voss

2.quote: Clean layout, obvious next steps. I keep dark mode on for late edits—small thing, but it matters when you ship weekly.
2.author: Jordan Park

3.quote: Journal PDFs in two languages were slowing me down. I get a workable draft and fix citations myself—good enough to move the paper forward.
3.author: Priya Nair

4.quote: Text, image, and PDF in one tab beats juggling three different sites. I pick a model when the tone matters, then move on.
4.author: Chris Okonkwo

5.quote: Voice memos from overseas partners used to sit in a folder. Transcribing plus translate in one flow gets replies out the same afternoon.
5.author: Rachel Bernstein

6.quote: Rough cuts with mixed languages—I pull dialogue out, translate, and drop lines back into my notes. Less stop-and-go than my old workflow.
6.author: Sam Okada

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Still have questions? We're happy to help—reach out via the options below

security.title: Data security & privacy
security.content: We do not keep your translations or uploads on our servers after processing. Your content may be sent to third-party AI providers to perform the service. See our Privacy Policy for details.

quota.title: How are quotas calculated and reset?
quota.content: Free tier: image, PDF, speech, and video quotas are per calendar month and reset on the 1st; unused usage doesn't roll over. Paid tiers: quotas are per calendar day and reset at midnight; unused usage doesn't roll over.

payment.title: What payment methods are supported?
payment.content: We use Stripe for payments. You can pay with major credit and debit cards. Stripe handles all payment details securely; we don't store your full card number or other sensitive payment data.

support.title: How do I contact support?
support.content: For questions about subscriptions, quotas, or usage, email us at hello@translation.ai and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: Translation Ai ("we", "us") provides this translation and content processing service. This policy explains what information is involved and how we handle it.
privacy.s2p:
• Account: When you register or use GitHub or Google sign-in, we process email, display name, and data needed for authentication.

• Usage: We record feature usage and quotas to enforce your plan.

• Content you submit: Text, images, documents, audio, or video you send are processed to deliver translation, OCR, speech, or video features. We do not use your content to train proprietary models for this product.
privacy.s3p: Providing the service requires sending data (which may include your content) to hosting providers, AI model APIs, and, for payments, Stripe. Those parties process data under their own terms and privacy policies. We do not store your full payment card number.
privacy.s4p: We do not intend to keep your translation inputs and outputs on our systems after processing is finished. We may retain account, billing, subscription, and limited operational and security logs as required to run the service and meet legal obligations.
privacy.s5p: We use HTTPS and reasonable access controls. No online service can guarantee perfect security.
